validators.name: git_clean_state
validators.protects: Dirty, staged, or untracked repo state must be visible before work continues.

validators.name: allowed_paths
validators.protects: Workers must stay inside the approved package scope.

validators.name: blocked_paths
validators.protects: Blocked paths must not be changed by the current package.

validators.name: json_integrity
validators.protects: JSON runtime and report files must parse before use.

validators.name: powershell_syntax
validators.protects: PowerShell files must parse before any later execution.

validators.name: markdown_exists
validators.protects: Required docs and runbooks must be present for operator review.

validators.name: no_secrets
validators.protects: Secrets, credentials, private keys, tokens, and .env files must not enter the package.

validators.name: no_live_trading_enablement
validators.protects: Broker, OANDA, webhook, live trading, and real order enablement must stay blocked.

validators.name: approval_gate
validators.protects: APPLY, commit, and push require human approval at the correct stage.

validators.name: commit_package_review
validators.protects: Commit packages must use exact-file review and must not use blind staging.

validators.name: final_git_status
validators.protects: Final repo state must be visible before the next safe action.

next_safe_action: Run the validator chain in DRY_RUN_READ_ONLY mode before APPLY, commit, or push.
